payload.title: [MEDIUM] Internal/Postgres error messages echoed to clients
payload.description: ~31 sites do catch(e){res.status(500).json({error:e.message})}; PG errors leak column/constraint/type detail (schema recon for a multi-tenant target). Logger itself is clean. FIX: generic {error:'internal error', reqId} for 500s; log the real error server-side; keep specific 400 validation messages.
